review_definitions.label: Secure Defaults
review_definitions.prompt_append: Also check for unsafe default configuration, opt-out security controls, and features that ship enabled without an explicit hardening step.
context_augmentation_rules: Inspect bootstrap, setup, and default-config paths before treating a missing control as unreachable.
Prefer findings that tie insecure defaults to the first-run or tenant-provisioning path that enables them.

review_presets.label: Secure Runtime
review_presets.summary: Security defaults plus runtime validation and failure-path checks.
